name: recoil_app_fmv_state_on_idle_or_dispatch
description: RecoilApp_FmvState::OnIdleOrDispatch ignores the idle dispatch parameters and keeps the FMV state active by returning 1.
known_limits: VC5SP3 compile-only target coverage exists through recoil_app_fmv_state_constructors; Binary Ninja byte comparison remains pending for the surrounding RecoilApp FMV-state class pass.
